problem: How are trauma and stress responses inherited epigenetically across generations?
mechanism: CRISPR gene editing targeting specific pathway
hypothesis: How are trauma and stress responses inherited epigenetically across generations? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of CRISPR. CRISPR gene editing targeting specific pathway directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Randomized controlled trial Phase I with 8 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
